channel.title: Scalable on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Scalable on Arrans github.io

item.title: ZoneMinder/zoneminder
item.description: ZoneMinder is a free, open source Closed-circuit television software application developed for Linux which supports IP, USB and Analog cameras.

item.title: philips-labs/terraform-aws-github-runner
item.description: Terraform module for scalable GitHub action runners on AWS
